title: Blue Q - Ice Cream Money Coin Purse
features: Made from 95-percent post-consumer recycled material and printed with lead-free inks
Cute as a button; just the change your change has been looking for
Small enough for your change but big enough for cash and credit cards
It has a crushed, wrinkled look; This is normal for the recycled content used; GOOOOOOO environment
1-percent of the sale of this coin purse will support the conservation work of the nature conservancy
description: Be prepared…you just never know when that ice cream truck might pull around the corner. Design by 64 Colors. 95% post consumer recycled material. 4.3"w x 3.2"h
